name: libbit-vector-perl
title: libbit-vector-perl
summary: Perl module for bit vectors and more
description:
Perl module for bit vectors and more
Bit::Vector is a module that allows you to handle bit vectors, integer sets,
"big integer arithmetic" and boolean matrices, all of arbitrary sizes. It is
efficient (in terms of algorithmic complexity) and therefore fast (in terms
of execution speed). It also provides overloaded operators for ease of use.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libbit-vector-perl because Perl module for bit vectors and more.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libbit-vector-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libbit-vector-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libbit-vector-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
